text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today marks the start of a long and arduous
journey in the Twinkle Series for me and my
trainee. Her name is...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Heya, how's it going? The name's Mejiro Palmer!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I might be like, part of the Mejiro family, but
don't mind that. I'm just here to make a name for
myself by doing my thing and running freely.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Aaanyways, enough sappy stuff! I'll be counting
on you, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so begin my days challenging the Twinkle
Series with <chrname>!
